allow: PowerShell($base = "g:\\マイドライブ\\サポーター\\近藤\\bandit"; $dirs = @\("assets\\css","assets\\js\\terminal\\commands","assets\\data\\filesystems","assets\\fonts"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path \(Join-Path $base $d\) | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Directory $base | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell($base = "g:\\マイドライブ\\サポーター\\近藤\\bandit"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Directory $base | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\($base, "."\) })

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; $base = "g:\\マイドライブ\\サポーター\\近藤\\bandit"; $jsFiles = @\("assets\\js\\progress.js","assets\\js\\app.js","assets\\js\\copy.js","assets\\js\\search.js","assets\\data\\levels.js","assets\\data\\commands.js"\); $node = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($node\) { foreach \($f in $jsFiles\) { $p = Join-Path $base $f; $r = & node --check $p 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "OK   $f" } else { "FAIL $f`n$r" } } } else { "node not available - skip syntax check" })

PowerShell($plain = "The password for the next level is:`ndecode-the-armor-and-read-clearly-10`n"; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($plain\); $b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String\($bytes\); Write-Output "PLAIN bytes: $\($bytes.Length\)"; Write-Output "BASE64: $b64")

PowerShell($b64 = "VGhlIHBhc3N3b3JkIGZvciB0aGUgbmV4dCBsZXZlbCBpczoKZGVjb2RlLXRoZS1hcm1vci1hbmQtcmVhZC1jbGVhcmx5LTEwCg=="; $decoded = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([Convert]::FromBase64String\($b64\)\); Write-Output "DECODED:"; Write-Output $decoded; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Contains target password? $\($decoded.Contains\('decode-the-armor-and-read-clearly-10'\)\)")

PowerShell($f = "g:\\マイドライブ\\サポーター\\近藤\\bandit\\assets\\data\\level-data.js"; $text = Get-Content $f -Raw; $openBraces = \([regex]::Matches\($text, "\\{"\)\).Count; $closeBraces = \([regex]::Matches\($text, "\\}"\)\).Count; Write-Output "File size: $\($text.Length\) chars"; Write-Output "Lines: $\(\(Get-Content $f\).Count\)"; Write-Output "Open braces: $openBraces, Close braces: $closeBraces \(must match\)"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "--- Last 10 lines ---"; Get-Content $f -Tail 10)
